name: turbodocx-skills
description: Two skills for TurboDocx integration: (1) turbodocx-sdk — install the TurboDocx SDK and generate working code for TurboSign (digital signatures) and TurboPartner (partner management) across JavaScript, Python, Go, PHP, and Java; (2) turbodocx-html-to-docx — set up @turbodocx/html-to-docx to convert HTML to Word documents in Node.js/TypeScript projects.
author: TurboDocx
